methods.description: This method involves the investigation of lithostratigraphy and facies/microfacies to understand the depositional context and palaeoenvironment around a cave. It includes field descriptions and micro-scale analysis of sedimentary facies.

steps.description: Prepare, clean, measure, and describe the sections inside the cave and survey, clean, measure, and describe the natural outcrops around and on the cliff just above and below the cave entrance.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and document lithostratigraphic data from cave and surrounding outcrops

steps.description: Perform facies analysis at the macroscale to get information about the depositional context and palaeoenvironment.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze facies at macroscale for depositional context

steps.description: Improve facies analysis by studying fine-grained sediments at a micro-scale using micromorphology of undisturbed samples.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct micromorphological analysis on fine-grained sediments

steps.description: Remove undisturbed samples using standard Kubiena boxes and prepare them in the lab by impregnation, curing, cutting, and preparing thin sections.
steps.searchable_summary: extract and prepare undisturbed samples for thin section analysis

steps.description: Analyze thin sections under a polarising microscope and capture images using a digital camera.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze and capture images of thin sections using polarising microscope

methods.description: This method involves dating flowstone and stalagmite samples using U-Th techniques to determine isotopic and concentration data.

steps.description: Select clean subsamples, gently crush, ultrasonicate, and dry them in a clean room.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare subsamples for U-Th dating by cleaning and drying

steps.description: Pick the cleanest fragments for U-Th chemistry and instrumental analysis using MC-ICP-MS.
steps.searchable_summary: perform U-Th chemistry and analysis using MC-ICP-MS

steps.description: Calculate uncertainties in the U-Th isotopic data offline.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate uncertainties in U-Th isotopic data

methods.description: This method involves field surveys to create geomorphological maps and assess morphostratigraphic positions of stratigraphic units and relative sea-level markers.

steps.description: Conduct field surveys to recognize and classify landforms and related deposits.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct field surveys for geomorphological mapping

steps.description: Assess the morpho-stratigraphical position of each Stratigraphic Unit based on lithostratigraphic and elevation data.
steps.searchable_summary: assess morpho-stratigraphical positions using lithostratigraphic data

steps.description: Measure the elevation of Marine Limiting Points using total station and GPS.
steps.searchable_summary: measure elevation of Marine Limiting Points with total station and GPS
